data.title: Natural Grocers to donate 1% of sales on World Food Day (Oct. 16, 2025) to support The Cornucopia Institute, aiming to raise over $45,000.
data.description: A fundraising initiative is set to take place on October 16, 2025, with the goal of raising over $45,000 for a nonprofit organization based in LAKEWOOD, Colo., dedicated to safeguarding the integrity of organic practices. This campaign coincides with World Food Day. Natural Grocers®, a prominent organic and natural products retailer, will be leading this effort.

data.title: Dr. Bruce Beutler unlocks disease mystery, advises going outside; featured in Investor's Business Daily.
data.description: Dr. Bruce Beutler, a noted scientist, suggests that to succeed in science, individuals should spend time outdoors. This advice has proven beneficial for Dr. Beutler, who uncovered crucial insights into disease mechanisms. His groundbreaking research has captivated readers, showcasing his remarkable contributions to the field. The post highlights Dr. Beutler's achievements, emphasizing his ongoing commitment to scientific exploration and innovation.

data.title: Tesla deliveries expected to rise with expiring EV tax credits boosting U.S. demand. TSLA stock increased, hitting highs in 2025.
data.description: Thursday marks the anticipated release of Tesla's third-quarter delivery numbers, with a surge in U.S. demand buoyed by expiring EV tax credits. This increase in demand has propelled Tesla's stock, which is currently near its peak at $2025. Investors are optimistic about the potential jump in Tesla deliveries due to the expiring tax credits.

data.title: GoDaddy introduces framework for identifying AI agents; 1 billion to be created by businesses in 3 years.
data.description: TEMPE, Arizona - A novel agnostic framework has been developed to facilitate the effortless discovery, verification, and reliance on AI agents. The proliferation of AI agents is occurring swiftly, with projections indicating that over one billion agents will be constructed by businesses in the upcoming three years. This framework aims to address the burgeoning need for navigating and validating the increasing number of AI agents entering the market.

data.title: Foundation Medicine gives grant to My Style Matters and H.Y.P.E. to Empower to boost biomarker testing in marginalized communities.
data.description: Two organizations, My Style Matters and H.Y.P.E. to Empower, have been granted funding by Foundation Medicine in Boston. The grant aims to boost biomarker testing specifically within Black, Latinx, and LGBTQ+ communities. This partnership seeks to enhance access to crucial medical testing for these marginalized populations.

data.title: EnviroGold Global enhances NVRO Process™ to extract silver from U.S. mine waste, enhancing supply security, creating jobs, and aiding environmental cleanup.
data.description: EnviroGold Global has made significant progress in developing their NVRO Process™ to extract silver from mine waste in the United States. This advancement not only enhances supply security for silver but also creates new job opportunities and contributes to environmental remediation efforts. This innovative process is set to increase the recovery of silver and bring about positive impacts on various sectors.
